Enis Mulić

Software Engineer

5+ years building cloud-native backends and data platforms on Azure — specialising in distributed systems, Event-Driven Architecture, Event Sourcing, and CQRS, with hands-on ownership across backend, DevOps, and infrastructure. Currently leading backend and infrastructure work on an enterprise data and analytics platform at RUBICON.

Panini Sticker Swap Platform

slibe.online

Platform for FIFA World Cup 2026 Panini collectors to track sticker albums and find swap partners. Scaled to 2K+ users and 170K+ stickers tracked within weeks of launch.

Fullstack Dictionary Application

↗
rjecnik-liard.vercel.app

OCR pipeline that converts a scanned PDF dictionary into a searchable web app — ~45K words and ~46K definitions — with a Next.js frontend and an admin dashboard for managing entries.
